message:
feat(artifact-merge): surface field correction warnings during EDIT operations

Wire up the correction arrays returned by normalizePayloadFields() and
coerceDomainStrings() as AUTO_CORRECTED warnings in the merge result.
Previously the corrections were returned but never consumed.

Each warning includes:
- The specific operation context (EDIT on research_thread create,
  EDIT on research_thread merge, or EDIT on section/target_id)
- The correction description (field alias rename or type coercion)
- The original delta raw JSON for debugging

This makes field alias resolution and type coercion visible to callers,
enabling audit logging and debugging when deltas use non-canonical field
names or unexpected types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
